positive: A retro 8-bit pixel art illustration of a cyberpunk ramen shop at night. Neon signs, steam rising from bowls, and futuristic rain-slicked streets. The palette should be limited to cyan, magenta, and electric yellow, giving a distinct vaporwave aesthetic. --ar 1:1
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, photorealistic, smooth gradients
